description:
UPGRADED FIGURE 8 RESISTANCE BAND - Different from traditional figure 8 exercise bands, HUICHAI elastic bands are lighter and more versatile. Thick natural latex, carrying silica gel granules in your hand, can massage your palms while training and promote blood circulation.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN ELESTIC ROPE: Made of natural latex, designed with an 8 shape, perfectly fits your hands and body, which is ergonomic and makes it more comfortable to use, helps to relieve stressed hands, and reduces frictional injuries.

OFFERS EFFECTIVE STRENGTH - Work out your arms, back, shoulders, legs, and butt all at once with a mobility band, perfect for body stretching, resistance training, yoga, and physical therapy to help strengthen torn ligaments or muscles.

GREAT WITH ANY WORKOUT - This pure barre equipment can be integrated seamlessly with every popular workout program including Yoga, Pilates, and more. Use them for general exercise, stretching, strength training, and power weight programs.

WORKOUT ANYWHERE: Designed for light and speedy mobility, the exercise band can be rolled up to stash in a gym bag, suitcase, or overnight trip making it perfect for travel, gym, or in-home use.

Describe:
1. This elastic band is lighter and more flexible, fits your hands and body perfectly, is comfortable to use, very suitable for improving chest hunchback and poor sitting posture, as well as for fat burning and shaping

2. The stretch strap is made of TPE, which has strong stretchability and breaks resistance, ergonomically designed, with a non-slip dot texture on the handle, which helps relieve hand pressure and massage the palm

3. The size is about 10.5*5*3.5 cm, easy to store in handbags, suitcases

4. Can be used for resistance training, yoga, and fitness shoulder, have it to exercise your hands, shoulders, legs, and buttocks, strengthen your muscles

Material: TPE
Size: 10.5*5*3.5cm/4*2*1.3inch

List:
1* Figure 8 Resistance Bands


Note:

Our default processing time is 1-3 working days(Normally 1-2 Days), and it usually can be delivered within a week. If there is no update for 3-4 days, that's quite normal and won't affect the delivery time.

If it has not been delivered after more than 10 days, please contact us immediately and we will help you quickly. Depending on the actual situation, we will urge the logistics company to update, reship, or refund.

We accept returns and refunds within 30 days.

Due to uncontrollable factors. Within 7 business days after we upload the tracking number, we do not accept refunds due to logistics problems. If there is still no update on the logistics information after more than 10 working days, you can contact us for a refund or resend.

Please contact us with any questions.
